info.english_meaning: to split to divide to separate to partition
info.kOmudIDAtukramANkaH: ayaM DAtuH sidDAntakOmudyAm pfTag rUpeRa nEva pAWyate  parantu tatra 4.114 vyuza~ ityatra 'ozWyAdirdantyAnto'yaM pyusa ityanye apakAro yusa ityapare' iti nirdeSena ayaM pAWaBedaH jYApitaH asti
